ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "ugds" INTEGER /* Total undergraduate enrollment */,
  "ugds_white" REAL /* Percentage of white undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_black" REAL /* Percentage of black undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_hisp" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_aian" REAL /* Percentage of American Indian/Alaska Native undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_nhpi" REAL /* Percentage of Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_2mor" REAL /* Percentage of students with two or more races */,
  "ugds_nra" REAL /* Percentage of non-resident alien undergraduate students */,
  "ugds_unkn" REAL /* Percentage of unknown race undergraduate students */,
  "intl_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Student-faculty ratio */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* Diversity index of the student body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "satvrmid" INTEGER /* SAT verbal median score */,
  "satmtmid" INTEGER /* SAT math median score */,
  "avg_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of the student body */,
  "grad_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the institution */,
  "ret_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "pptug_ef" INTEGER /* Percentage of students who are federal Pell Grant recipients */,
  "pctpell" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students who are federal Pell Grant recipients */,
  "pctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students who receive federal loans */,
  "ug25abv" INTEGER /* Percentage of students 25 and older */,
  "avg_fin_aid_award" REAL /* Average financial aid award */,
  "net_price_calculator" TEXT /* Net price calculator URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduate_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate outcome record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "md_earn_wne_p10" REAL /* Median earnings of working graduates 10 years after entry */,
  "grad_debt_mdn_supp" REAL /* Median debt of graduates */,
  "grads_advanced_degrees" INTEGER /* Number of graduates who pursue advanced degrees */,
  "grads_employed" INTEGER /* Number of graduates who are employed within six months of graduation */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary of graduates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "hbcu" INTEGER /* Historically Black College or University indicator */,
  "menonly" INTEGER /* Men-only institution indicator */,
  "womenonly" INTEGER /* Women-only institution indicator */,
  "relaffil" INTEGER /* Religious affiliation indicator */,
  "distanceonly" INTEGER /* Distance education only institution indicator */,
  "curroper" INTEGER /* Current operating status of the institution */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the institution */,
  "sustainability_initiatives" TEXT /* Sustainability initiatives of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, student) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the institution data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type used by the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
